overlays.title: Full Keyboard Access
overlays.summary: Keyboard-first navigation for controls, focus rings, and dialogs across macOS apps.
overlays.primary_use: Fallback browser-native navigation when direct AX actions are unavailable.

overlays.title: Accessibility Keyboard
overlays.summary: On-screen keyboard and dwell-oriented input surface exposed by macOS Accessibility.
overlays.primary_use: Operator-observable typing and shortcut fallback when hardware keyboard paths are constrained.

overlays.title: Voice Control
overlays.summary: System command grammar, item numbering, and command set customization for UI control.
overlays.primary_use: Reference grammar and surface naming source for future command catalog expansion.

overlays.title: Switch Control
overlays.summary: Scanning-based control model with custom panels, recipes, and device inputs.
overlays.primary_use: Alternative input taxonomy for non-pointer orchestration and future accessibility templates.

overlays.title: Mouse Keys
overlays.summary: Keyboard-driven cursor movement and click control within macOS.
overlays.primary_use: Last-resort pointer fallback when a native browser surface cannot be actioned directly.

overlays.title: Panel Editor
overlays.summary: Custom accessibility panels and controls that can be surfaced through Switch Control and related features.
overlays.primary_use: Future host-defined control surface templates and curated action groups.
